name: Bavarian Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Sauerkraut, Bavarian style (27 oz each)
2 lb Polish kielbasa sausage, precooked and cut into 3-inch pieces
1 medium Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bottom of a slow cooking pot, layer 1 can sauerkraut, 1 lb sausage pieces, half the onion slices, 1/2 tablespoon boulllon, and 1/4 teaspoon celery seed.
2. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on setting #3 (low) in West Bend cooker for 7-9 hours or on setting #5 (high) for 3-4 hours.
4. Serve with boiled potatoes and apple raisin salad.
